title: Create: Stressed Out
description: Why be stressed out when you can Play with a Community, or play on your own. Creating your own adventure based on designs of your own imagination! With a vast mix of World building addons, Giant Structures to Explore, or Huge Structures to Build!
body:
# Create: Stressed Out!
📸 A multiplayer-focused modpack where automation, creativity, and calm come together through the power of Create.

In Create: Stressed Out!, you and your friends step into a cooperative world of invention and imagination. Built around the acclaimed Create mod and its limitless mechanical possibilities, this pack adds an extra layer of charm through immersive visuals, relaxed exploration, and creative expression.

Whether you're engineering vast assembly lines or just capturing a serene sunset with your in-game camera, this is a modpack where the joy of building, automation, and multiplayer moments all come together—with less stress, and more satisfaction.

## Key Features
🛠️ Create-Focused Gameplay – Build sophisticated machines and systems using Create and its ecosystem

🤝 Multiplayer-Centric Design – Built with servers and collaboration in mind—ideal for friend groups and communities

🌊 Soothing Visuals – Enjoy calming enhancements like Coastal Waves and immersive touches from Diagonal Fences, Nyf’s Spiders, and more

🌱 Lush, Natural Biomes – Explore a grounded, beautiful world thanks to Regions Unexplored, Geophilic, Nature's Spirit, and William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld

🏰 Simplified, Structured World Generation – With Dungeons & Taverns and Endercon, enjoy a balance of natural beauty and handcrafted charm

🧭 Future-Forward Features – Vanilla Backport brings upcoming vanilla content like Pale Gardens and Happy Ghasts into your current experience!

## Why Play "Create: Stressed Out!"?
💬 Made for Moments – Capture and share meaningful multiplayer experiences

🧠 Creative Without the Crunch – Automation and progression at your own pace, with plenty of time to build and breathe

🎨 Beautiful, Functional Worlds – From the rippling waves on a beach to the cobbled paths of a village tavern, every detail enhances immersion

🔄 Balanced for Groups – Whether you're building together or tackling projects in parallel, this pack supports collaborative play from start to finish

## Before You Play
🔹 Recommended Specs: A mid-range PC is recommended to enjoy the enhanced visuals and smooth multiplayer experience. 
### { **Minimum Memory**: **4GB** | **Recommended memory**: **6GB**+ }
🔹 Multiplayer-Friendly: Optimized for both casual and dedicated server setups
🔹 Ongoing Support: Actively maintained and updated alongside Create's evolving ecosystem
